examples: He appealed to his country's nativism.
Of or relating to or advocating nativism.
Critics who branded the book as a work of undisguised nativism missed an essential point.
But neither Presbyterian nativism, or any other sectarian impulse, would have sufficed to underpin a revolution.
The trick is to argue for greater cosmopolitanism and less nativism than we see today, without having to advocate for open borders.
